title: AuditEvent
description: F031 audit.event.v1 — the on-the-wire shape every producer (policy-service F029, gateway F018, admin console F032, label-mapping CRUD F017, etc.) writes onto the audit.event.v1 topic and the audit-service appends into audit.audit_entries.

event_id.description: Globally unique event identifier (UUIDv7 recommended). Idempotency key.

tenant_id.description: Tenant UUID. The audit chain is per-tenant.

id.description: Stable identifier of the actor (user UUID, service-principal UUID, system component name).

ip.description: Source IP of the request. Producers should record only the client IP, never internal load-balancer IPs.

action.description: Dotted-namespace action verb, e.g. policy.create, policy.update, routing.override, console.login, label_mapping.create.

type.description: Resource kind, e.g. policy, routing_rule, label_mapping, user, service_principal.

payload.description: Action-specific details. NEVER contains prompts, completions, passwords, API keys, OAuth tokens, or bearer tokens. The audit-service runs a defense-in-depth redact step on insert.

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp produced by the originating service. The audit-service uses NOW() for the persisted row's created_at; this field records the producer-side timestamp for skew diagnosis.

trace_id.description: W3C trace context trace-id, if available.
